---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an improvement or new feature for Ginger Wallet"
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before submitting:

• Read the documentation.
• Search existing feature requests.
• Consider opening a Discussion first if the idea is exploratory.
• Be aware that Ginger Wallet development is primarily managed internally.
-->

## Description

Clearly describe the proposed feature.

What should it do?
How should it behave?
What would change compared to the current implementation?

---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this solve?

Is this addressing:
- A usability limitation?
- A privacy concern?
- A performance bottleneck?
- A workflow inefficiency?

Explain the real-world use case.

---

## Expected Benefits

Describe the practical impact:

- Who benefits?
- How does it improve the wallet?
- Does it align with privacy, security, or reliability goals?

---

## Scope and Complexity (Optional)

If you have technical insight, describe:

- Which component it might affect
- Whether this requires UI changes
- Potential trade-offs or risks

(High-level reasoning only — code contributions are generally not accepted.)

---

## Supporting Material

Include mockups, diagrams, screenshots, or external references if helpful.

---

## Acknowledgement

I understand that:

- Ginger Wallet development is primarily managed internally.
- Not all feature requests will be accepted.
- The team prioritizes features based on long-term vision, privacy, and security considerations.
